stemHtml: Severe compressor stall in a gas turbine engine can be observed amongst others by…

options.a: a rise in turbine gas temperature (TGT) and an increase in vibration level.
options.b: an increase in engine pressure ratio (EPR) and a decrease in TGT and fuel flow.
options.c: a rise in TGT and an increase in fuel flow.
options.d: a decrease in TGT and a increase in vibration level.
